photographyStyle.styleNotes: Documentary-style on-the-job shots — Cypress homes, real Kirchner crews, warm and authentic. Avoid stock-electrician imagery.

designDirection.rationale: Kirchner's 40 years operating + 4.9★ / 237 reviews + family-owned positioning is the structural advantage. Trust-First archetype puts review depth, longevity, and licensure badges above the fold. Authority and Velocity archetypes presented alongside for partner comparison.
designDirection.verticalAdjustments: Electrician-specific: licensure number visible, 24/7 emergency line in sticky mobile CTA, Google Guaranteed badge if/when LSA active.

interiorServicePage.rationale: Highest-LTV residential service. Anchors the Primary Highest Value persona (Heather & Mark Thompson). Hurricane-season urgency means the page earns its keep year-round in Houston metro.

differentiators: Family-owned — not a franchise, not an aggregator

complianceFlags.customNotes: Texas licensure number must be visible per state regulation. Add to footer and contact page.
